releases.notes: Google sync repair. Calendar sync now requests the correct Google Calendar permissions for NodOne's dedicated calendar, and Settings shows explicit permission, update, zero-eligible, and failure states instead of silent no-ops. Google backup now uses clear current-data/current-cloud semantics with confirmation before replacing the current cloud backup; older backups remain in history. Calendar adds Month, Week, and Day views while keeping the NodOne UI, plus explicit import from the dedicated Google NodOne calendar. Contacts and Gmail import now surface clear Google-only status and errors. Microsoft sync is deferred until separate real-account QA. Device name now follows Windows hostname changes unless manually renamed.

NodOne v2.0.2 — Google Sync Reliability hotfix

Hotfix on top of v2.0.1.

- Fixes the Google sign-in retry trap: if the browser is closed without logging in, Settings now has a Cancel / try again path and the backend clears the pending OAuth session immediately.
- Calendar and Contacts sync runs no longer report success when Google provider work actually failed. Provider failures now mark the run failed with a short, actionable error code.
- Settings now reports visible sync outcomes for Google backup, calendar, and contacts: synced counts, conflict counts, zero-eligible explanations, or failure reasons.
- Clarifies v2 Calendar behavior: NodOne syncs opted-in NodOne rows to the dedicated Google calendar named `NodOne`; it does not import an existing primary Google Calendar.
- Email Import is Google-only in this release, with clearer Gmail search, no-results, missing-permission, and provider-error states. The Settings toggle now tells the user to open a project → Communications → Import from email.
- Keeps Microsoft sync deferred from active UI until a separate real-account Microsoft QA pass.

SHA-256:
`9d9fb3a69fe3c2c0d28e2e4764c671287f8b331f328383a06ce28fc0bd5ab8c1`

NodOne v2.0.1 — Google Cloud Sync hotfix

Hotfix on top of v2.0.0.

- Packages the Google OAuth desktop client configuration and Picker API key into the Windows installer so Google Connect can open the normal browser sign-in flow instead of failing as unconfigured.
- Keeps Microsoft Cloud Sync deferred in release builds until the Microsoft Entra app registration is provisioned; Microsoft code remains in place, but the packaged UI disables Microsoft connect honestly instead of showing a broken flow.
- Improves Cloud Sync error copy so wrapped API errors show the real setup problem instead of a generic "Connection failed."
- Pins packaging tools and restores the known-good installer build flow; `update-helper.exe`, `NodOne.exe`, and the Inno installer now build cleanly.

SHA-256:
`51f6de4ca50111a1c13fa78d3b8afb3d4b1971a471c6584c4aaf018de30e9fe8`

NodOne v2.0.0 — Cloud Sync

Major release adding optional Google + Microsoft cloud sync while preserving NodOne's local-first model.

- Whole-app snapshot backup and restore through Google Drive and Microsoft OneDrive.
- Separate device-local sync state for DPAPI-protected OAuth tokens, device identity, OAuth sessions, restore flags, and sync baselines.
- Backup manifests carry metadata only: no OAuth tokens, refresh tokens, PKCE verifiers, or portable device-local identity.
- Restore safety flow with pre-restore local package, local-only file preflight, strict manifest validation, alembic compatibility checks, rollback paths, and mutation blocking while restore is active.
- Google Drive uses a visible `NodOne Backups` folder with Picker re-grant for lost-folder recovery; Microsoft uses least-privilege AppFolder storage.
- Calendar sync for opted-in meetings, tasks with due dates, and workflow events.
- Contacts sync for opted-in contacts.
- Email import remains on-demand only: no background mailbox scan, no startup read, no send.
- Conflict handling for backup snapshots and object sync, including stale-account/account-mismatch handling after cross-device restore.
- Tombstones for locally deleted synced objects so provider deletes can be pushed later.

SHA-256:
`579706897a9d933d8a5a3fc787184749e916687a27ac61e7182017b3f67840bb`

Hotfix on top of 1.0.0. Status dropdown is no longer clipped by the next row. Clicking a Pending/Billed/Paid pill in Billing (and the same pattern in Tasks / Events) used to open the dropdown only as a top sliver — the row's overflow:hidden ate the rest. Switched the dropdown to fixed positioning anchored to the trigger's bounding rect so it escapes any ancestor's overflow clip; opens upward when there isn't room below; closes on scroll so it never appears stranded. Single-component change in InlineStatusEditor — every callsite (workspace Tasks, workspace Billing, global Billing, workspace Events) benefits. No backend, no migration.

First major version. Office preview is now pixel-truthful: opening a .docx / .xlsx / .pptx routes the file through Microsoft Office COM (Word/Excel/PowerPoint), converts to PDF, and renders pages as images via pypdfium2 — fonts, layout, page breaks all match what Word/Excel/PowerPoint draw. The pager shows the real page count (was hardcoded 1 for docx). First open is 1–3 seconds while Office runs; subsequent opens and page-flips are instant. Cache lives at Documents\NodOne\runtime\preview-cache\<sha>.pdf keyed by (path, mtime_ns, size) — any edit invalidates automatically. LRU-evicts at 200 MB. If Office isn't installed, docx falls back to Mammoth HTML and xlsx to openpyxl JSON; pptx surfaces as 'File type not supported'. v0.9.x visual polish bundled in (cream-everywhere column headers, Tasks Status/Due centered, row-hover standardized to lineSoft). No DB migration — launcher safety net for unknown DB revisions remains in place from v0.9.3.

Visual polish on top of 0.9.3. Cream is for column-header bands only — Andrea spotted that yesterday's group-rows-cream regression was actually a deeper miss: every list page had its column header fall back to white. Now uniform across Tasks/Contacts/Files/Billing/Checklist workspace tabs and global Projects/Contacts/Checklists/Templates. Data rows (including task group rows) stay plain white; per-section dividers (Billing per-project bands, Meetings per-date bands, Templates per-kind bands, Mahinay per-kind bands) keep their cream — those are sub-headers. Tasks Status + Due columns now center-aligned under their headers; column gap bumped 12→16. BillingTab row hover bgApp→lineSoft (the last v0.9.2-P5 holdout). No backend changes, no migration.

Hotfix on top of 0.9.2. Single change: launcher safety net so an 'unknown DB revision' state never blocks app boot again. Forward-migrated DB + older installed binary now boots normally (skips migration with a log warning) instead of fatal-dialoging — the in-app auto-update workflow stays intact, no manual reinstall ever needed. Everything from 0.9.2 ships forward unchanged.

Everything Editable. Eleven sub-phases consolidated. No hardcoded 'kinds' that block deletion: _UNCHECKED_VOCAB_KINDS lock retired, every vocab kind deletable, Preferences-scoped ref check for tz/currency/date-format prevents orphaning Andrea's active settings, Pydantic Literal[...] removed from capture/artifact/checklist_template/project_checklist/invitee/synthesis/workflow_step schemas so Andrea-created vocab rows can actually be assigned. NGCP/hazard foundation dropped via Alembic migration b3c1a2d5e7f9 (gate.is_ngcp_variant column, tower table, vocab_hazard_kind, hazard_assessment_per_tower workflow_kind + steps; router and models moved to _deprecated/). Fresh-install crashes fixed: seed.py task kwargs (kind → task_kind), and every new project (seed or API) now gets the 6 canonical project_subfolder rows via create_default_subfolders() — Workshop filing finally works on a fresh install. Root error boundary, Workspace/Calendar/Billing query error UI, update-check console-spam gated behind window.__NODONE_DEBUG_UPDATE__. Tasks: right-click wording fixed (group children are 'Add task' not 'Add subtask'); + Add task modal grew a Kind segmented control (Group/Task/Subtask radiogroup with keyboard nav) + Parent picker. Send to Gantt actually works: dropped HEAD preflight, direct GET → blob → showSaveFilePicker, RFC 5987 filename* preferred so em-dashes survive, date_format and per-task planned_start emit DD/MM/YYYY (matches Gantt's native shape), source_version reads from VERSION file. IEE: multi-photo upload loops the full FileList with batched undo + partial-failure handling, submit_to_denr step propagates to parent status, global dashboard filters soft-deleted projects, step PATCH refuses on cancelled/rejected/completed parents. Files preview missing-on-disk card now also catches 'no file attached'. Hard-delete cascade ORM-walks ProjectSubfolder, FolderIndex, and workflow polymorphic children (WorkflowStep, Capture, Synthesis, Invitee, Artifact, DenrApplicationValue) so action_log captures every row; explicit db.flush() between cascade levels prevents SQLAlchemy reorder from breaking child audit INSERTs; audit.py short-circuits project_id=None on Project hard-delete. Frontend bundle code-split (initial chunk 730 kB → 295 kB, 59% reduction). Schema drift gate cleared: new migration d4e6f8a0b1c3 adds the artifact unique constraint, document_template.template_family_id index, and named files.project_subfolder_id FK that models declared; six models updated to declare composite indexes DB had. alembic check is clean except one documented metadata-display item (vocab_personal_kind.position REAL vs Float — SQLAlchemy maps Float→REAL on SQLite by design). Design coherence: focus rings on form inputs, per-variant Button hover/active states (audit caught and fixed inverted danger active), row hover standardized to tok.lineSoft, unified loading-state convention, all 7 form-modal Cancel buttons variant='ghost', FileExtBadge migrated to tok.fileBadge. Billing global page: 'Overdue' card renamed to 'Outstanding' (no due-date field exists; label now matches what's actually computed). Codex audit ran end-to-end before publish — every essential finding landed.

Document Confidence hotfix on top of v0.9.0. Preview pane now works for every uploaded file (docx/text/image/pdf — the v0.9.0 fetcher choked on non-JSON responses). Template previews surface kind='missing' with a 'No file uploaded yet' card instead of a hard 404 when the .docx isn't on disk. Vocab built-in categories with zero references are now deletable on the Document Templates page (Andrea was blocked by a blanket 409); kinds with references show concrete counts in the refusal. Tasks page: parent-leaf rows revert to plain white — cream is for headers only; EventsTab column header matches the unified Billing pattern. Uploaded transcripts now group paragraphs under collapsible heading sections via Word's outline-level metadata (1 H1 + 12 H2 + 9 H3 in the test scoping transcript renders correctly). IssueLogPanel rows gain hover-reveal Edit + Delete, both undoable; edit uses a safe remove-then-append with compensating re-append on failure. Event status pill now reflects actual status (the v0.9.0 create flow silently overrode it to 'not_started') and is click-to-edit inline. Meetings empty state cross-links to Calendar where tasks live. Topbar gains Back / Forward / Refresh icon buttons (pywebview hides the host browser chrome). Workshop scan budget is now per-folder + new 'Scan existing' button for folders configured to filter out old files. Two independent Opus audits ran on the diff; 5 Essentials landed before publish (React hook-order, style-chain cycle guard, template path-traversal guard, vocab-kind delete blocking for non-countable kinds, atomic issue edit with rollback). No database migrations.

Document Confidence release. Visual rhythm fixed across Tasks, Document Templates, and Admin (Billing-pattern cream group headers, no progress bars on Tasks). Universal FilePreview component + preview endpoints for files, captures, artifacts, personal records. Per-template card UI on Event and IEE detail pages with preview, generate, replace, and Open in Word actions; generate is fully undoable (artifact + companion Files row + disk file removed in one transaction on Ctrl+Z). New POST /api/iee_applications/{id}/generate-docs with Pydantic payload. Template editor detail panel shows placeholders + version history + restore-this-version. Gantt-compatible export (.gantt v1 schema, ADR-0010) via Tasks toolbar button. Soft-hide for unused built-in personal kinds (is_hidden migration e7f28aa73c16, restore endpoint, Mahinay admin disclosure). Three audits ran the diff before release; six release blockers + four post-audit follow-ups landed; remaining defense-in-depth items tracked honestly in BACKLOG.md. DENR document generation deferred with documented reason.

Undo coverage closes ADR D14 across every form modal, page CRUD, workflow modal, and the DENR/IEE status transitions. Files now obeys folder-as-truth: uploads land in the chosen subfolder on disk, category move physically moves bytes + updates relative_path atomically, category rename cascades to every file, category delete physically migrates files to the default subfolder before deleting the row. Real undo trash/restore for Files / Document Templates / Personal Records via .trash/{uuid}/ staging, with validated restore endpoints. Task rollup: backend exposes is_parent as single source of truth; frontend keys chevron-vs-checkbox, computed status pill, read-only due, strikethrough, toolbar count off that flag. Leaf-parents (task_kind='leaf' with subtasks) finally render correctly. TaskFormModal hides Status+Due when editing a parent. Group delete physically deletes descendants in post-order + audits each. Contacts filters Andrea reported missing: Inbound / Outbound / Waiting reply / Follow-up due, with legacy contact_name fallback so older communications still match. Workshop newly-added folder first-scan bypasses the 30-day cap once, then auto-engages on subsequent scans. Documents tab covers every active workflow kind via _WORKFLOW_MODELS mapping. Visual: Tree-row chrome from dnd-kit neutralized via scoped CSS override; Tasks / Document Templates / Admin now share Checklist Templates' calm hairline-row pattern. Sidebar tagline removed; wordmark vertical-centers with logo. Smaller fixes: confirm dialog body shows for string args; NoteFormModal task picker filters task_kind=='leaf' && !is_parent; vocab PATCH honors parent_id:null; useUpdateCheck no longer refires after available; updater accepts the GitHub Releases path with sentinel + origin check; personal-kinds delete respects referential integrity instead of blanket is_builtin lock.

Claude Design refit across all five surfaces (Tasks, Checklist, Document Templates, Checklist Templates, Admin). One chrome, one card, one type rhythm. Tasks: bordered card + sentence-case header strip + group rows with X-of-Y count + 72px progress bar + dim status pill + rolled-up due date; right-click context menu (Add subtask / Edit / Delete); subtask depth indent + tree-line connectors; visible drag handle removed (long-press anywhere on a row activates drag). Checklist: section header on the same grid as items, 44px-tall item rows indented 28px under their section, hover-only chevron-down replaces trash. Document Templates: flat hover-bg rows with Template/Last-used header strip; right pane gains TITLE/DESCRIPTION/BODY eyebrows + Variables chips + quiet … menu. Checklist Templates: header strips on both panes, dropped dot bullets, ItemRow inline click-to-edit (no edit-card, no up/down arrows). Admin: populated state flattened (no nested cards). Tokens: card #FFFFFF, line #E8E3D6, lineSoft #EFEBDF, indigo accent #5B4FCF; system sans-serif everywhere. Latent fixes: Templates kindCollapsed state-mutation bug; all template last-used dates routed through formatDate(prefs); dead reorder mutations + arrow/mini button helpers removed.

De-Gantt-ification. Every Wave 4 feature is intact (subtasks, computed parents, drag-reorder, Ctrl+Z everywhere, GitHub-API auto-update from 0.8.2). What changes is how it looks. Removes the chart-tool chrome that crept in along with the new functionality: progress bars under group titles, bordered cards around lists, ALL-CAPS letterspaced column headers, four-card cockpit on the Dashboard. Replaced with NodOne's own quieter visual language — sentence-case headers, mute2 inline counts, breathing room instead of dividers. The single guiding principle: hierarchy through type, not through chrome.

Reliability sweep + 0.8.1 launcher hotfix. Adds the missing nodone_backups_root export that crashed every 0.8.1 install on the post-update boot. Hoists all app.paths imports in launcher.py to module top so missing exports crash at the developer's keyboard, never silently in production. Adds a frontend asset probe at boot that catches blank-window failures with a Win32 message box pointing at launcher.log. Frontend update discovery now queries the GitHub Releases API directly instead of polling a hand-maintained manifest — single source of truth, no second PR per release. Bell popover shows the release notes inline. Backwards-compatible: the old releases.json polling path stays active in 0.8.2 for 0.8.0 instances that haven't upgraded.

The v2 overhaul. Ctrl+Z works on every state-changing action; toasts replaced by a persistent Undo strip. Tasks gain subtasks up to 4 levels deep with drag-to-reorder; parent tasks auto-compute status, due date, and progress from children. Files tab is a two-pane layout with editable per-project categories that mirror to disk on rename. Mahinay personal records gain nested categories. Workshop moved out of the sidebar into Preferences with a native folder picker. New Add Issue modal with Type / Upload / Paste tabs auto-extracts stakeholder issues from Transcriber .docx output (49 issues parsed in under a second, zero LLM calls). Templates page rebuilt with a category tree. Public Hearing event kind added. Event status now editable from EventFormModal. Mail-merge replaces the old invitee-merge-source flow.

First release with the burn-down/stage-0-governance feature integration: Workshop file-sorter, Mahinay admin page, Templates page, IEE applications panel, DENR mock tab, Hazard Assessment foundation, vocabulary tables + Preferences editor, Workspace.jsx tab split into 9 per-tab files, FlexDateInput, file launcher. Architectural change: data root moved from LOCALAPPDATA to USERPROFILE/Documents/NodOne (one-time migration shim runs at first launch in packaged app only).

Flat 2D logo across all surfaces (sidebar tile, favicon, .ico, apple-touch-icon) â€” matches brand reference. Version display added to Preferences page (About section). Auto-update test target â€” install over 0.1.4 to verify the upgrade flow.

Critical blank-page fix: null deref in confirm.jsx (state.confirmLabel accessed before first confirm dialog open crashed React tree). Flat installer logo: solid #554AB2 background replaces gradient; 4x supersampled render eliminates pixelation on tetrahedron mark.
